facts: IIT Kanpur is located in Kalyanpur, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh 208016.
IIT Kanpur has 15 halls of residence — 12 for boys and 3 for girls.
Hall 13 is the 1st year boys hostel with double/triple sharing.
Hall 2, Hall 3, and Hall 5 are for 2nd and 3rd year students with double/triple sharing.
Hall 12 is for 3rd year students with single and double sharing.
Hall 7, Hall 9, and Hall 11 are for 4th year students with single sharing.
Hall 1 is for 4th year students with higher responsibilities (General Secretary, Organizer, etc.) with single sharing.
Hall 8 and Hall 10 are for PhD and higher education students with single sharing.
Hall 14 is for PG and MTech students with single sharing.
All halls have canteens, stationery shops, and printout facilities.
All boys halls have barber shops.
Halls have indoor games: table tennis, carrom, and chess.
Some halls have outdoor facilities: volleyball, cricket ground, basketball.
Hall 4 is for 1st year girls with double/single sharing.
Hall 6 is for 2nd, 3rd, and 4th year girls with double/single sharing.
Girls Hostel 1 is for PG and higher studies students with double/single sharing.

mess.system: Hall-attached (each hall has its own mess)
daily_items: Breakfast: Bread (white & brown/rusk), jam, butter, milk (Bournvita/Horlicks/Coffee), egg (2 pcs), tea, dalia, cornflakes.
Lunch: Roti (plain + buttered), plain rice, pickle, raita/dahi/fruit, chicken fried rice.
Dinner: Roti (plain + buttered), plain rice, pickle, chicken fried rice, milk.
highlights: Chicken fried rice available daily at lunch and dinner.
Monday breakfast: Aloo Pyaz Paratha. Monday dinner extra: Butter Chicken, Roasted Chicken.
Tuesday breakfast: Khasta Kachori, Paratha. Tuesday lunch extra: Egg Biryani.
Wednesday breakfast: Uttapam with Sambhar and Coconut Chutney. Wednesday dinner extra: Chicken Bharra, Kadhai Paneer.
Thursday breakfast: Bombay Sandwich, Paneer Cutlet. Thursday dinner extra: Chilli Chicken, Fish Finger.
Friday breakfast: Indori Poha with Jalebi and Curd. Friday dinner: Chicken Biryani, Chandrakala.
Saturday breakfast: Idli, Masala Idli, Wada with Sambhar. Saturday dinner extra: Chicken Malai Tikka, Honey Chilli Potato.
Sunday breakfast: Mysore Dosa/Masala Dosa with Sambhar. Sunday dinner: Paneer/Chicken Korma, Gulab Jamun, Garlic Naan.
mess.extras: Neebu Pani/Rasna/Roohafza served with lunch daily.

facts: DOAA Canteen is open 24 hours.
Every hall has its own canteen.
On-campus restaurants: Mama Meow, Tadka Restaurant, Chai Pani Restaurant, Campus Restaurant.
On-campus chains: Cafe Coffee Day, Starbucks, Burger Singh, Subway, Dominos Pizza.
Food delivery: Swiggy and Zomato are available.
Full fee structure PDF was shared via Google Drive link (Cumulative Fee Structure 2025-2026) but not included in WhatsApp export.
Mess and electricity bills combined cost approximately Rs 4,000 per month, in addition to the semester fee.
fee_structure.note: Tuition/academic fee NOT provided — data gap. Only monthly mess+electricity cost known.

facts: IIT Kanpur has IITK 5G WiFi network.
4G connectivity is available across approximately 90% of the campus.
Attendance is not mandatory for all courses at IIT Kanpur — it depends on the professor.
A minimum of approximately 75% attendance is required to appear in semester exams.

cultural: Anime Society — anime watchers and manga readers community.
Book Club — close knit group of bookworms with wide ranging genre interests.
Dance Club (Krazzy O've Sync) — dance club of IIT Kanpur.
Debating Society — inter-university debate tournaments and discussions.
Design And Animation Club — digital design and animation.
Dramatics Club (Fursat Mandli) — theatre and nukkad enthusiasts.
English Literary Society — literature, oratory skills, word games.
Fine Arts Club (FAC) — diverse forms of art promotion.
Film Club — short films, sketches, and workshops.
Hindi Sahitya Sabha — promoting Hindi literature and creativity.
Humour House — comedy of various forms.
Music Club — music across genres, jamming sessions.
Quiz Club — esoteric knowledge and quiz competitions.
Student Film Society — cinema and diverse film formats.

facilities: Old Sports Complex: Gym, Skating Rink, Tennis, Volleyball, Basketball.
Hall indoor games: Table tennis, carrom, chess.
Hall outdoor (some halls): Volleyball, cricket ground, basketball.
gyms: Most halls have gym facilities free of cost.
Old Sports Complex gym: Rs 350 per month for students (monthly/semester/yearly options).

facts: Dhobi service is available in all halls and comes to every room.
Washing machines are available in halls.
1 common laundry facility is available for all students.
No data provided on student council/elections — data gap.
IIT Kanpur Health Centre is open 24 hours.
Medical services are free — insurance is included in the semester fee.
Ambulances are available for emergencies.
If admitted to a hospital outside campus, up to Rs 1 lakh is reimbursed upon bill submission.
Kanpur Central Railway Station is approximately 18 km from campus.
Chakeri Airport is approximately 20 km from campus.
Jagarkati Bus Stop is approximately 15 km from campus.
On-campus: Mama Meow, Tadka Restaurant, Chai Pani Restaurant, Campus Restaurant, Cafe Coffee Day, Starbucks, Burger Singh, Subway, Dominos Pizza.
Food delivery: Swiggy and Zomato available.
Winters go below 6°C.
Summers exceed 45°C.
The climate is extreme — very cold winters and very hot summers.
The primary language at IIT Kanpur is Hindi.
English is also widely used.
Late academic or pre-registration fine is Rs 2,000 to Rs 2,500.
